summary: Repeatable MIND+LIGHT cast probe for health checks and lightweight resonance reads
description: Expands to cast with a stable objective prefix and fixed aspects—useful when agents repeatedly sanity-check resonance without re-specifying intent fields.
recommended_for: Smoke or liveness casts before heavier work
Agents that should send the same cast shape with only the subject line changing

recommendation.why_better: The bundle keeps cast arguments short and consistent and records arcane_provenance—fewer mistakes than free-form objectives on every call.
